title: GH-Powers
description: The dependency for Some of my Mods, (Only use for the New Version Of Gods & Heroes Palladium Version)
body:
### This Mod do Nothing by it self, you have to download my most Recent **Gods & Heroes Palladium Version**

This Mod only add things to my gods and heroes palladium version and its required in the new versions

### Recomendado
### You have to download the mods:
- Gods & Heroes Palladium Version
- Origins
- Pehkui


### If you are playing Forge you can also download:
- Ars Nouveau


# Dependencys:
